Container.Name: lancache-manager
Container.Overview: Lancache Manager - Web UI for managing your Lancache server. Monitor cache performance, manage downloads, and configure your lancache setup.
Container.Description: Lancache Manager provides a web-based dashboard for monitoring and managing your Lancache game download cache server. Includes PostgreSQL, real-time SignalR updates, Steam Prefill support, corruption detection, cache management, and more.

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: User ID for file permissions. Unraid default: 99 (nobody)

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Group ID for file permissions. Unraid default: 100 (users)

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Port for the Lancache Manager web interface.

Config.Name: Data Directory
Config.Description: Required: Data directory for the database, PostgreSQL data, API key, themes, and cached images.

Config.Name: LANCache Logs
Config.Description: Required: Path to your LANCache log directory. Use :ro for read-only (recommended for monitoring-only). Remove :ro to allow log manipulation.

Config.Name: LANCache Cache
Config.Description: Required: Path to your LANCache cache directory. Use :ro for read-only monitoring. Remove :ro to enable cache clearing, corruption removal, and game removal.

Config.Name: Docker Socket
Config.Description: Optional: Docker socket for nginx log rotation and Steam Prefill. Required for signaling nginx to reopen logs and spawning prefill containers.

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Timezone for log timestamps and display. See: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_tz_database_time_zones

Config.Name: LANCache Log Path
Config.Description: Path to the LANCache access log file inside the container.

Config.Name: LANCache Cache Path
Config.Description: Path to the LANCache cache directory inside the container.

Config.Name: PostgreSQL Username
Config.Description: PostgreSQL username for the internal database.

Config.Name: PostgreSQL Password
Config.Description: PostgreSQL password. If not set, a first-run setup page will collect credentials. Once set via the UI, they persist in /data.

Config.Name: ASP.NET Core URLs
Config.Description: Internal port binding. Do not change unless you know what you are doing.

Config.Name: Enable Authentication
Config.Description: Master switch for authentication. true = require API key for admin features (recommended). false = disable ALL authentication (development only).

Config.Name: Max Admin Devices
Config.Description: Number of devices that can share the same API key simultaneously.

Config.Name: Guest Session Duration (Hours)
Config.Description: Default guest session duration in hours (configurable in UI after first run).

Config.Name: Require Auth for Metrics
Config.Description: Require API key for Prometheus /metrics endpoint. false = /metrics is publicly accessible.

Config.Name: Nginx Log Rotation Enabled
Config.Description: Automatically signal nginx to reopen logs after manipulation. Requires the Docker socket volume mount.

Config.Name: Nginx Container Name
Config.Description: Name of the LANCache container for log rotation. 'auto' = auto-detect containers with 'lancache' in the name.

Config.Name: Steam Prefill Docker Image
Config.Description: Docker image for per-user Steam Prefill containers.

Config.Name: LANCache Env File Path
Config.Description: Path to lancache .env file for reading CACHE_DISK_SIZE when Docker socket is unavailable. Leave blank to auto-search: /srv/lancache/.env, /opt/lancache/.env, /lancache/.env

Config.Name: Auto Discover Datasources
Config.Description: Auto-detect datasources by scanning /cache and /logs for matching subdirectories.
